{{Infobox religious building
| name = Onotoufuu Shrine
| native_name = 小野道風神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

| native_name = 小野道風神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 小野道風神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Onotoufuu Shrine | native_name = 小野道風神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Onotoufuu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.149959|135.921347}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Onotoufuu Shrine'''|小野道風神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].
